task: Rebuild decision logic from the embedded packet, identify threshold crossings, test sensitivity of conclusions (including a 5% sensitivity shift), and produce an auditable test suite and compliance memo. All calculations must use only the embedded packet. Produce retention_policy_tests.yaml (executable/reproducible test definitions and formulas) and compliance_memo.md (review-ready narrative with intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final decision table). Mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review. Do not invent inputs or use outside data. When any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift, mark expert-review required.
